stemHtml: When radar vectoring ends, ATC will instruct...

options.a: Resume own navigation, position 15 NM South of VOR XY.
options.b: Resume own navigation direct VOR, track 270°, FL60.
options.c: Resume previous navigation, position 15 NM South of VOR XY.
options.d: Resume own navigation direct VOR, track 270°T.
